candidate_definition_hints.text: FunCodec is a research-oriented toolkit for audio quantization and downstream applications, such as text-to-speech synthesis, music generation et.al.
This project is still working on progress. To make FunCodec better, please let me know your concerns and feel free to comment them in the `Issues` part.
